annotator_notes: Faith-based endurance — seasons framing of difficulty

english_gloss: I have outgrown certain things
annotator_notes: Personal growth acknowledgement — quiet maturity

pidgin_text: I go handle am my own way
english_gloss: I will handle it my own way
annotator_notes: Asserting independence in conflict resolution — female self-reliance

pidgin_text: You no want see me when i vex
english_gloss: You don't want to see my angry side
annotator_notes: Warning before escalation — female controlled anger

pidgin_text: I go leave am for God
english_gloss: I will leave it for God
annotator_notes: Surrendering conflict to God — female faith response to injustice

pidgin_text: I no dey fight for market
english_gloss: I don't fight in public — I have standards
annotator_notes: Refusing to lower herself to public conflict — dignity statement

pidgin_text: E go make sense one day
english_gloss: It will make sense one day
annotator_notes: Faith that current struggle has future meaning

pidgin_text: I dey go even if dem no clap for me
english_gloss: I am going even if nobody claps for me
annotator_notes: Moving without validation — self-fuelled female ambition

pidgin_text: My hustle no be for show
english_gloss: My hustle is not for show
annotator_notes: Authentic effort over performative grind — female work ethic

english_gloss: How is your family?
annotator_notes: Family welfare greeting — communal care register

english_gloss: How is your family?
annotator_notes: Family welfare greeting — communal care register

english_gloss: Is everything okay now?
annotator_notes: Follow-up greeting checking on a previous situation

english_gloss: I am feeling lighter today
annotator_notes: Emotional relief — burden lifted, feeling better than before

english_gloss: Something just shifted for me — internally
annotator_notes: Internal breakthrough — emotional or spiritual shift

english_gloss: I am feeling myself today — confident
annotator_notes: Confidence and self-possession — good day energy

pidgin_text: I no dey hide my joy
english_gloss: I am not hiding my joy
annotator_notes: Unashamed happiness — refusing to dim own light

english_gloss: I allowed myself to feel it
annotator_notes: Permitting emotional processing — female self-awareness register

pidgin_text: This testimony no be small thing
english_gloss: This testimony is not a small thing
annotator_notes: Weight of answered prayer — not taking blessing lightly

english_gloss: God is always on time
annotator_notes: Affirming divine timing — common Nigerian faith expression

english_gloss: I will look back and laugh at this season
annotator_notes: Future faith perspective on present difficulty — testimony framing

pidgin_text: I don leave am for God
english_gloss: I have put it in God's hands
annotator_notes: Surrendering conflict to God — faith response to injustice

english_gloss: You think it is easy?
annotator_notes: Contempt at someone dismissing difficulty — cold downward energy, not anger

english_gloss: This is her problem — she is the issue.
annotator_notes: Cold contempt distancing from a female — speaker is not angry, just done

english_gloss: I am ready to make it big
annotator_notes: Fired-up energy of someone who feels their moment is coming — confident and activated

pidgin_text: This year na my year, nothing go stop me
english_gloss: This year is my year, nothing will stop me
annotator_notes: Declarative hustle energy — statement of intent and unstoppable momentum

pidgin_text: I dey build something big, just watch me
english_gloss: I am building something big, just watch me
annotator_notes: Confident hustle energy — building with excitement and anticipation of results

pidgin_text: E dey sweet me to grind like this
english_gloss: I genuinely enjoy grinding like this
annotator_notes: Rare positive relationship with hard work — enjoying the grind, not just enduring it

english_gloss: My hard work is paying off
annotator_notes: Hustle energy expressed as visible results — the grind is working and the person feels it

pidgin_text: I no go sleep until I finish this work
english_gloss: I will not sleep until I finish this work
annotator_notes: Activated hustle mode — deliberate sacrifice of comfort for the work. Different from hustle_fatigue which is depleted.

pidgin_text: Na this grind go make me great
english_gloss: This grind is what will make me great
annotator_notes: Purposeful hustle energy — connecting current work to future greatness

pidgin_text: I get ginger today, nothing go slow me down
english_gloss: I have energy and motivation today, nothing will slow me down
annotator_notes: Ginger in Lagos Pidgin = motivation and energy. Daily hustle energy when everything feels aligned.

pidgin_text: Poverty no go see me again
english_gloss: Poverty will never find me again
annotator_notes: Defiant hustle energy — grind fuelled by memory of lack. Common declaration in Lagos grind culture.

pidgin_text: I wan make am before 30, I dey work for am
english_gloss: I want to be successful before 30, I am working toward it
annotator_notes: Time-pressured hustle energy — the 30 benchmark is a specific Nigerian youth cultural marker for success

pidgin_text: E never easy but I no dey give up
english_gloss: It is not easy but I am not giving up
annotator_notes: Resilient hustle energy — acknowledges difficulty but maintains forward momentum. Secondary hustle_fatigue shows the cost.

pidgin_text: I dey on my grind, watch how e go turn out
english_gloss: I am grinding hard, watch how it will turn out
annotator_notes: Confident grind energy — the outcome is anticipated with certainty. Watch me energy.

pidgin_text: I no get time for this kind person
english_gloss: I have no time for this kind of person
annotator_notes: Cold contempt — dismissal without anger. The person is beneath the speaker's engagement.

pidgin_text: E no reach my level abeg
english_gloss: He/she has not reached my level, please
annotator_notes: Contempt expressed as superiority — the other person is not worth direct engagement because they are on a lower level

english_gloss: Who are you even?
annotator_notes: Sharp contempt question — sef amplifies the dismissiveness. Questions the person's worth or authority.

pidgin_text: I no send am at all at all
english_gloss: I do not care about him/her at all
annotator_notes: I no send = I do not care/regard. At all at all is Pidgin intensifier for absolute dismissal. Total contempt through indifference.
